positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application dashboard or home page
steps: Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify no error messages are shown on screen
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is blocked and validation error messages are displayed for both empty fields
steps: Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Username is required' or 'Please fill in all fields'
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails when both username and password fields are empty
